title: OFBT Test Corpus Manifest
description: Per-fixture traceability manifest. Phase 0.8 deliverable per ROADMAP. Every file under tests/corpus/ ending in .fixture.js MUST have an entry in the `fixtures` array; every entry MUST reference an existing fixture file. CI gate: scripts/check-corpus-manifest.js.

manifestVersion.description: Semver of this manifest schema. Bumps when columns are added/removed.

fixtureId.description: Stable identifier matching the fixture filename (sans .fixture.js).

phase.description: Phase that the fixture activates in (not necessarily the phase that authored it; cross-phase fixtures use the activating phase).

specSections.description: Spec / API spec section refs, e.g., ['§3.7.1', 'API §6.1'].

acceptanceCriteria.description: Criterion IDs from spec §12 / API §14, e.g., ['§12.13', 'API-2'].

arcEntries.description: ARC entry IRIs the fixture exercises. Empty for built-in OWL fixtures (Phase 1-3).

expectedOutcome.description: Structured per fixture type — entailment-set, consistency verdict, round-trip diff, etc. Free-form by design; the fixture's own DSL determines the shape.

expectedLossSignatureReasons.description: Reason-enum members expected in emitted Loss Signatures. Empty for clean round-trip fixtures.

intendedToCatch.description: What wrong translation or silent failure this fixture is engineered to expose. REQUIRED — fixtures without an articulated intent get pruned in review.

expected_v0.1_verdict.description: The verdict v0.1 produces today (under the v0.1 lifter/projector/validator).

expected_v0.2_elk_verdict.description: The verdict v0.2 should produce after ELK lands. null when no change is expected. The regression-suite signal for ELK integration.
